commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Twelfth. Houbigant would substitute 14th, to make the dates agree, p. 113. See chap. xv. 30. (Haydock)
Till this time, Osee had been tributary to the Assyrian monarch. (Grotius)
Hebrew may be, "in the 12th year.Osee.had reigned. Nine years; which is true. (Calmet)
He reigned so long afterwards, ver. 6. (Haydock)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: In the twelfth year of Achaz king of Juda: He began to reign before: but was not in quiet possession of the kingdom to the twelfth year of Achaz.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
